user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the HUD (UI) disappears because `renderUI(p)` is only called during the "PLAYING" phase. The user wants the HUD to remain visible when paused, but without any pause overlay or pause message.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Add `renderUI(p)` call to the "PAUSED" case in the draw loop to keep the HUD visible while paused. No pause overlay or message exists in the current code, so no removal is needed.
